Bash(sqlcmd -S . -U sa -P 2470 -d ProcumentDB -C -Q "SELECT name FROM sys.tables WHERE name IN \('Procurements', 'ProcurementItems', 'ProcurementSupplierQuotes'\); SELECT c.name FROM sys.columns c JOIN sys.tables t ON c.object_id = t.object_id WHERE t.name = 'POItems' AND c.name IN \('SourceProcurementItemId','ReturnedAt','ReturnedFromPOId','ReturnReason'\);")
Bash(sqlcmd -S . -U sa -P 2470 -d ProcumentDB -C -Q "SELECT MigrationId FROM __EFMigrationsHistory ORDER BY MigrationId DESC;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S . -U sa -P 2470 -d ProcumentDB -C -Q "SELECT TOP 5 MigrationId FROM __EFMigrationsHistory ORDER BY MigrationId DESC;")
Bash(sqlcmd -S . -U sa -P 2470 -d ProcumentDB -C -Q "SELECT name FROM sys.tables WHERE name IN \('Procurements', 'ProcurementItems', 'ProcurementSupplierQuotes'\);")

Bash(sqlcmd -S . -U sa -P 2470 -d ProcumentDB -C -Q "SELECT name FROM sys.tables WHERE name IN \('Procurements','ProcurementItems','ProcurementSupplierQuotes'\); SELECT name FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID\('POItems'\) AND name IN \('SourceProcurementItemId','ReturnedAt','ReturnedFromPOId','ReturnReason'\); SELECT name FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID\('ProcurementItems'\) AND name IN \('LoopCount','LastReturnReason','LastReturnedAt','FulfilledByPOItemId'\);")
